ExplicitIdentifier.Title: STRING := if D2N = 1 then "Cat Circ. Rate to FCC Riser by Regen HB" else "Cat Circ. Rate by Regen HB" endif
"[Riser 2] Cat Circulation Rate by Regen HB"
ExplicitIdentifier.Hidden: VALUE := if not Use_R2 then 1 endif

ExplicitIdentifier.Title: STRING := if Use_R2 then "[Reactor 1] C5-FBP Research Octane Number (RON)" else "C5-FBP Research Octane Number (RON)" endif
STRING := if Use_R2 then "[Reactor 1] C5-FBP Motor Octane Number (MON)" else "C5-FBP Motor Octane Number (MON)" endif
